about.bio.1: My curiosity drives everything I do. From exploring how behavioral data shapes consumer decision-making, to designing the systems that make complex financial and insurance experiences feel effortless—my mind is constantly solving the next problem. A gap in my knowledge is simply an invitation to learn, iterate, and deliver something better.
about.bio.2: Ultimately, it is my ability to translate complex, data-heavy problems into simple, elegant, user-friendly workflows—and communicate that process clearly to product, engineering, and executive stakeholders—that defines my work and sets it apart.
about.quote.text: Great design removes friction from the moments that matter most to people.
about.title: A systems thinker with a consumer-first point of view
about.value.0.desc: Every consumer experience begins with a genuine question: where is the friction, and why does it exist?
about.value.0.title: Curiosity-led
about.value.1.desc: In high-stakes consumer flows—insurance, subscriptions, financial decisions—the smallest ambiguity creates the biggest drop-off.
about.value.1.title: Detail-obsessed
about.value.2.desc: Aligning product, engineering, data science, and executive stakeholders around a shared design direction is the fastest route to shipping work that matters.
about.value.2.title: Communicator at heart
about.value.3.desc: Every design decision is a hypothesis. Measuring outcomes and iterating toward better performance is how great consumer products are built.
about.value.3.title: Outcome-driven

modal.project.0.challenge: Within four months of deployment, insights generated by the AI persona platform directly informed targeted consumer engagement strategies and reversed a negative profit trajectory. The business moved from a –17% operating margin to +2%, improved consumer retention and subscription renewals, increased average order value, and reduced friction for new consumer onboarding—demonstrating how thoughtfully integrated AI can drive measurable commercial outcomes when grounded in responsible design, rigorous research, and a deep understanding of consumer behavior.

modal.project.0.outcome.0: Reversed negative profitability from a –17% operating margin to +2% within four months through AI-powered consumer insights.
modal.project.0.outcome.1: 15% improvement in consumer retention and subscription renewals driven by real, actionable behavioral data.
modal.project.0.outcome.2: 10% increase in average order value and consumer lifetime value through personalized engagement flows.
modal.project.0.outcome.3: Reduced consumer acquisition friction and onboarding drop-off by proactively addressing decision-making barriers.
modal.project.0.outcome.4: Scaled organizational awareness of consumer behavior across ~40 users in sales, service, field development, and executive leadership.
modal.project.0.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.0.overview: An AI-powered consumer persona platform built on live business intelligence data. Combines structured behavioral, demographic, and psychological insights—enabling teams to understand not just who consumers are, but how and why they make decisions. Designed for clarity, trust, and responsible AI integration.

modal.project.0.quote.text: This platform fundamentally changed how we understand and engage our consumers. Within four months it enabled more precise targeting and smarter interactions that moved our operating margin from –17% to +2%, while strengthening consumer trust and long-term engagement.

modal.project.0.title: AI-Powered Consumer Persona Platform
modal.project.1.challenge: I architected and led delivery of a comprehensive design system to modernize a fragmented multi-product consumer experience spanning marketing, sales, consumer-facing portals, and internal communications tools. The goal was not only visual renewal but a durable system improving consistency, scalability, and execution speed—aligning every design decision with consumer outcomes and business growth.
modal.project.1.kpi.0.label: Reduction in Delivery Time
modal.project.1.kpi.1.label: Designers Impacted
modal.project.1.kpi.2.label: More Design Deliverables
modal.project.1.kpi.3.label: Designer Hours Saved
modal.project.1.outcome.0: Established consistent design patterns across all consumer-facing products, eliminating inconsistencies between designers and teams.
modal.project.1.outcome.1: A shared source of truth clarifying scope, deliverables, and expectations for all design artifacts—aligned to consumer and business outcomes.
modal.project.1.outcome.2: Alignment between UX strategy and business goals by embedding intent directly into system standards and component governance.
modal.project.1.outcome.3: Increased confidence and autonomy of junior and mid-level designers through clear, repeatable, scalable patterns.
modal.project.1.outcome.4: Gained executive trust by providing visible, consistent standards referenced across deliverables org-wide.
modal.project.1.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.1.overview: Delivered as a hybrid greenfield and progressive migration, the system lives in Figma and is referenced directly in the CMS—enabling designers, engineers, and leaders to operate from a shared source of truth. Adoption materially improved delivery speed, design quality, and team confidence, transforming design from a reactive service into a scalable, strategic capability.

modal.project.1.quote.text: This system changed how we work. Delivery time was cut by roughly 50%. Visual and interaction quality jumped significantly. We went from weeks assembling concepts to delivering clean, standardized prototypes in days. It raised the bar for every consumer-facing project.
modal.project.1.skills.heading: Skills Applied
modal.project.1.title: Design System Architecture
modal.project.2.challenge: I defined the experience strategy and interaction design for a modernized consumer onboarding and membership advancement flow. The core challenge is twofold: making it genuinely easy for new and existing consumers to join and activate—in full compliance with regulatory and business requirements—while ensuring prospective members clearly understand the value of the products and the opportunity, without confusion, friction, or loss of trust.
modal.project.2.kpi.0.label: Target NPS Increase
modal.project.2.kpi.1.label: Consumer Touchpoints Redesigned
modal.project.2.kpi.2.label: Projected Churn Reduction
modal.project.2.kpi.3.label: Target Completion
modal.project.2.outcome.0: Clarified consumer value proposition, reducing hesitation and confusion at tier selection and onboarding entry points.
modal.project.2.outcome.1: Improved trust and transparency in cart and checkout through clearer expectations, guided success states, and reduced cognitive load.
modal.project.2.outcome.2: Enabled subscription-led consumer activation as a first-class experience rather than an optional afterthought.
modal.project.2.outcome.3: Reduced friction for consumers advancing toward higher-value participation and engagement levels.
modal.project.2.outcome.4: Established a scalable onboarding and advancement framework aligned with long-term consumer retention and revenue growth.
modal.project.2.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.2.overview: This initiative reframes consumer onboarding as a guided progression rather than a transactional gate—aligning interaction design, subscription mechanics, and platform architecture across landing pages, cart, and checkout. The experience is designed to encourage first-time visitors to activate with a product subscription and confidently advance toward deeper engagement. The result is a scalable foundation that improves conversion, reduces abandonment at critical moments, and supports sustainable consumer growth.
modal.project.2.overview.heading: Overview

modal.project.2.phases.heading: Project Phases
modal.project.2.quote.text: By simplifying the consumer journey and aligning it with subscription-based engagement, we plan to reduce effort at the most fragile points of conversion. Early analysis shows faster completion times, higher subscription attachment at join, and improved consumer confidence—an update that supports both revenue and long-term retention.
modal.project.2.skills.heading: Skills Applied
modal.project.2.title: Consumer Onboarding & Activation Experience
modal.project.4.challenge: Leading end-to-end UX redesign of cart and checkout for a high-volume consumer marketplace facing critical revenue leakage from abandonment rates exceeding 80%. Declining consumer trust and checkout flows that diverged significantly from modern marketplace and fintech standards positioned this as a business recovery effort—not a visual refresh. The design challenge: restore trust, reduce cognitive load, and enable revenue-positive consumer behaviors directly within the cart experience.
modal.project.4.kpi.0.label: Monthly Cart Interactions
modal.project.4.kpi.1.label: Abandonment Reduction Target
modal.project.4.kpi.2.label: Consumer Trust Signal
modal.project.4.kpi.3.label: Target Go-Live
modal.project.4.outcome.0: Clear, confidence-driven cart experience addressing consumer uncertainty and hesitation at the point of purchase.
modal.project.4.outcome.1: Reduced effort in checkout flows by eliminating unnecessary steps, ambiguity, and decision paralysis.
modal.project.4.outcome.2: Enabled subscriptions as a first-class action directly within the cart—increasing lifetime value and retention.
modal.project.4.outcome.3: Parity with modern marketplace and fintech UX standards, closing the gap with top-performing consumer platforms.
modal.project.4.outcome.4: Measurable lift in revenue, retention, and consumer trust metrics through isolated, A/B validated UI improvements.
modal.project.4.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.4.overview: Restoring consumer trust, reducing cognitive load, and enabling revenue-positive behaviors directly within the cart—including subscriptions, intelligent upsell, and frictionless express checkout. Partnering with executive leadership, PMO, and engineering to establish a design-led roadmap that aligns interaction decisions with measurable business outcomes and consumer experience standards.

modal.project.4.quote.text: Reframing cart and checkout as a consumer growth system rather than a technical necessity, early validations expect meaningful reductions in abandonment, faster checkout completion, and measurable lift in subscription adoption—directly impacting revenue and consumer trust.
modal.project.4.skills.heading: Skills Applied
modal.project.4.title: Cart & Checkout Consumer Experience
modal.project.5.challenge: Leading experience strategy and interaction design for a new sitewide AI-driven intelligent search experience to address a critical trust and relevance failure. Legacy search returned inaccurate results, forcing consumers to rely on external search engines to find products—directly undermining conversion confidence and consumer trust in the platform.
modal.project.5.kpi.0.label: AI-Powered Search Results
modal.project.5.kpi.1.label: SERP Accuracy Target
modal.project.5.kpi.2.label: Revenue & Conversion Impact
modal.project.5.kpi.3.label: Official Kickoff Date
modal.project.5.outcome.0: Restore consumer trust in on-site search by prioritizing exact, intent-matched results in the most visible positions.
modal.project.5.outcome.1: Reduce consumer effort by guiding searches that yield ambiguous or no results rather than failing silently.
modal.project.5.outcome.2: Accelerate paths to cart and checkout through intelligent product recommendations and contextual upsell logic.
modal.project.5.outcome.3: Unify discovery across products, content, support, and service resources into a single, coherent consumer experience.
modal.project.5.outcome.4: Establish search as a strategic consumer tool and growth lever supporting subscriptions, engagement, and retention.
modal.project.5.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.5.overview: Search is a core consumer experience layer—not a utility. By combining deterministic relevance logic with a custom AI API layer, the new system is designed to deliver exact, high-confidence results, guide consumers when intent is unclear, and surface recommendations that accelerate cart, checkout, subscription, and engagement actions.

modal.project.5.quote.text: By rebuilding search around relevance and intent rather than keywords alone, we reduce friction at the earliest stage of the consumer journey.
